input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.7.5.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.7.5.2
            TITLE: sound level will be verified during technical inspection, refer to in.10

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.7.5.2: Sound level will be verified during Technical Inspection, refer to IN.10
IC.7.5.2 Sound level will be verified during Technical Inspection, refer to IN.10

final_answer: Sound level will be verified during Technical Inspection, refer to IN.10
